description:
Offered: may be less than once every two years
This course is a continuation of Mandarin for Beginners I. Students will increase general comprehension and facility in speaking, listening, reading and writing. Students will be able to read and write up to 300 simplified characters and their corresponding pinyin romanization. The course will treat aspects of Modern Chinese society, as well as highlights of Chinese culture and history.
Prerequisite(s): CHIN 1000 or permission of the instructor.
prerequisites: CHIN 1000 or permission of the instructor.
